rationale: Neutral baseline when no archetype rule exists

attacker_archetype: # Weights derived from actual Weapon.ini damage types vs Armor.ini armor modifiers.
# Assumes COST-PROPORTIONAL groups: cheap units field more bodies vs expensive targets.
# Defenders in small groups (2-3). Attackers in moderate groups scaled by cost ratio.
# Example: 5-6 Missile Defenders ($1500-1800) vs 1 Overlord ($2000) -- not strict 1v1.
# SMALL_ARMS: 100% vs HumanArmor 25% vs TankArmor 50% vs TruckArmor 120% vs AirplaneArmor
# INFANTRY_MISSILE: 10% vs HumanArmor 100% vs TankArmor 50% vs TruckArmor 120% vs AirplaneArmor
# FLAME: 150% vs HumanArmor 25% vs TankArmor 0% vs DragonTankArmor
# GATTLING: 100% vs HumanArmor 10% vs TankArmor 120% vs AirplaneArmor
# EXPLOSION: 100% vs HumanArmor 100% vs TankArmor 100% vs StructureArmor
# JET_MISSILES: 25% vs BaseDefenseArmor 25% vs AirplaneArmor 30% vs AntiAirVehicle
# COMANCHE_VULCAN: 100% vs HumanArmor 25% vs TankArmor 50% vs TruckArmor
# Typical group: 4-8 vs a single expensive unit

rationale: Mirror matchup; equal damage type effectiveness
SMALL_ARMS 100% vs HumanArmor; INFANTRY_MISSILE only 10%. Rifles kill rockets ~10x faster
Snipers one-shot infantry but groups overwhelm; 4+ rifles can rush a single elite
SMALL_ARMS 50% vs TruckArmor; 3 rifles ($675) vs Humvee ($700) can overwhelm with focus fire
Gatling/Quad shred infantry fast but a cost-matched group (3-4 rifles) trades reasonably
SMALL_ARMS 25% vs TankArmor is poor but 4 Rangers ($900) = 50DPS total to tank; overwhelm through bodies before crush clears all
8+ Rangers ($1800) = 100DPS at 25% modifier vs 1100HP; still slow but cost-matched rifles do threaten with mass. Overlord splash/crush thins group fast
Cost-matched rifle group can rush fragile artillery; but artillery splash punishes infantry groups harder than singles
SMALL_ARMS 120% vs ComancheArmor; group of rifles puts out real volume but helicopter kites and picks off
Even in groups cannot meaningfully threaten aircraft on a pass
Rifle group focus-fires Terrorists before they close; more rifles = more interception
SMALL_ARMS 50% vs StructureArmor; even in groups very slow siege vs high HP
INFANTRY_MISSILE 10% vs HumanArmor = ~4 DPS each; rifle infantry shreds rockets regardless of group size
Mirror matchup; both deal 10% to each other
INFANTRY_MISSILE 10% vs HumanArmor; elites dominate even vs small rocket groups
2 MDs ($600) vs Humvee ($700); 40DPS combined at 50% = decent. Vehicle gun kills 1 MD fast but second finishes it
2 MDs ($600) vs Gatling ($800); INFANTRY_MISSILE 50% = 40DPS combined. AA kills MDs fast but takes real damage
3 MDs ($900) vs Crusader ($900); 120DPS combined at 100% kills 480HP in 4s. Tank crushes 1 but dies to remaining 2
5-6 MDs ($1500-1800) vs Overlord ($2000); 200-240DPS at 100% kills 1100HP in ~5s. Overlord kills 1-2 MDs but group wins
2-3 MDs ($600-900) vs artillery ($900-1600); rockets at full damage outrange and kill fragile targets
2-3 MDs vs Comanche ($800); INFANTRY_MISSILE 120% = concentrated AA fire. Multiple rockets make helicopter survival unlikely
3-4 MDs vs Raptor ($1400); INFANTRY_MISSILE 120% vs AirplaneArmor. Multiple rockets increase hit probability per pass
INFANTRY_MISSILE 10% vs HumanArmor for Terrorists still poor; but cost-matched group has more shots to intercept
3+ MDs at INFANTRY_MISSILE 25-50% vs defense armor; concentrated fire is effective siege
